description_long: This is a vintage Coca-Cola bottle canister, cylindrical in shape, with a predominantly red label featuring the iconic Coca-Cola script in white and the phrase 'DRINK IN BOTTLES.' The label wraps around the body, bordered by black and white bands at the top and bottom. One side of the canister displays a classic glass Coca-Cola bottle illustration with additional branding text. The base is solid and embossed with the Coca-Cola logo, while the top appears to be open or damaged, revealing a rough, jagged edge. The surface shows significant wear, with visible dents, scratches, and chipped paint, suggesting age and heavy use. The object is made of metal, likely tin or steel, with a painted exterior and no visible contents inside.
description: A worn, vintage Coca-Cola metal canister with a red and white branded label, featuring dents, scratches, and an open, jagged top.
description_view_0: The side view highlights the large Coca-Cola script and 'DRINK IN BOTTLES' text on a red background, with visible wear and chipped paint.
description_view_1: The bottom view shows a solid, white base embossed with the Coca-Cola logo, surrounded by minor dents and surface imperfections.
description_view_2: This side view displays the illustration of a classic glass Coca-Cola bottle and additional branding, with more pronounced surface wear and label aging.
description_view_3: The top view reveals a jagged, open edge with torn metal and exposed interior, indicating significant damage and lack of a cap.
attribute_label_or_branding: Coca-Cola script in white on a red background, 'DRINK IN BOTTLES' text, illustration of a classic glass Coca-Cola bottle, and embossed Coca-Cola logo on the base.
attribute_damage_or_deformation: Significant dents, scratches, chipped paint, and a jagged, open top with torn metal.
